ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the location */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the location in square kilometers */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_data" (
  "housing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing data entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the data was collected */,
  "housing_median_age" INTEGER /* Median age of housing units */,
  "total_rooms" INTEGER /* Total number of rooms */,
  "total_bedrooms" INTEGER /* Total number of bedrooms */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "households" INTEGER /* Number of households */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of households */,
  "median_house_value" INTEGER /* Median house value */,
  "year_collected" INTEGER /* Year when the data was collected */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property */,
  "square_feet" INTEGER /* Total living area in square feet */,
  "bed_bath_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of bedrooms to bathrooms */,
  "median_age_of_occupants" INTEGER /* Median age of occupants */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("housing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the data was collected */,
  "population_growth_rate" REAL /* Population growth rate */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution of the population */,
  "income_distribution" TEXT /* Income distribution of the population */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the location */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Ethnicity distribution of the population */,
  "education_level_distribution" TEXT /* Education level distribution of the population */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the data was collected */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* GDP growth rate */,
  "median_household_income" INTEGER /* Median household income */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate */,
  "employment_sector_distribution" TEXT /* Employment sector distribution */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing market trend entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the data was collected */,
  "housing_price_index" REAL /* Housing price index */,
  "rental_price_index" REAL /* Rental price index */,
  "sales_volume" INTEGER /* Sales volume */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trend data */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the trend data */,
  "vacancy_rate" REAL /* Vacancy rate */,
  "new_constructions" INTEGER /* Number of new constructions */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_market_trends_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, researcher, business leader) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "housing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the housing data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to access the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_housing_id FOREIGN KEY ("housing_id") REFERENCES housing_data ("housing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "housing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the housing data used in the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, map, table) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_housing_id FOREIGN KEY ("housing_id") REFERENCES housing_data ("housing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "housing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the housing data used in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_housing_id FOREIGN KEY ("housing_id") REFERENCES housing_data ("housing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the forecast */,
  "housing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the housing data used in the forecast */,
  "forecast_type" TEXT /* Type of forecast (e.g., linear regression, ARIMA) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the forecast was generated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the forecast */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_housing_id FOREIGN KEY ("housing_id") REFERENCES housing_data ("housing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., data analyst, researcher, business leader) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view data, download data, create reports) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES users_roles ("role_id")
)
